title: Find the Difference of Two Arrays

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2,3], nums2 = [2,4,6] Output: [[1,3],[4,6]] Explanation: For nums1, nums1[1] = 2 is present at index 0 of nums2, whereas nums1[0] = 1 and nums1[2] = 3 are not present in nums2. Therefore, answer[0] = [1,3]. For nums2, nums2[0] = 2 is present at index 1 of nums1, whereas nums2[1] = 4 and nums2[2] = 6 are not present in nums1. Therefore, answer[1] = [4,6].
testcases.expectedOutput: [[1,3],[4,6]] Explanation: For nums1, nums1[1] = 2 is present at index 0 of nums2, whereas nums1[0] = 1 and nums1[2] = 3 are not present in nums2. Therefore, answer[0] = [1,3]. For nums2, nums2[0] = 2 is present at index 1 of nums1, whereas nums2[1] = 4 and nums2[2] = 6 are not present in nums1. Therefore, answer[1] = [4,6].

testcases.input: nums1 = [1,2,3,3], nums2 = [1,1,2,2] Output: [[3],[]] Explanation: For nums1, nums1[2] and nums1[3] are not present in nums2. Since nums1[2] == nums1[3], their value is only included once and answer[0] = [3]. Every integer in nums2 is present in nums1. Therefore, answer[1] = [].
testcases.expectedOutput: [[3],[]] Explanation: For nums1, nums1[2] and nums1[3] are not present in nums2. Since nums1[2] == nums1[3], their value is only included once and answer[0] = [3]. Every integer in nums2 is present in nums1. Therefore, answer[1] = [].
